name: File and Directory Permission Modification after Download
notes: This rule detects file and directory permission modification after file download event.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: File Permission Changed match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Devices, BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

when BB:CategoryDefinition: File Permission Changed match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events, BB:BehaviorDefinition: PowerShell File Download Activity, BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Download Events match
thresholds: when BB:CategoryDefinition: File Permission Changed match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events, BB:BehaviorDefinition: PowerShell File Download Activity, BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Download Events match
TD_list: APPLY File and Directory Permission Modification after Download on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Devices, BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

AND when BB:CategoryDefinition: File Permission Changed match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events, BB:BehaviorDefinition: PowerShell File Download Activity, BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Download Events match
RED_list: Event name: File and Directory Permission Modification after Download
Event description: Detects file and directory permission modification after file download event.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
